human_verification.notes: Reviewed operational boundaries, evidence handling, seasonality, traceability, and escalation paths for fisheries execution workflows; verified scenario and ability coverage.

review_notes: Readiness evidence is complete across manifest, scenarios, functionality map, research summary, results, release, deployment, and marketing notes.
specification-based runtime is explicitly recorded with a clear retained-implementation promotion gate.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are constrained to execution status, lifecycle progression, evidence closure, exception, and escalation notes tied to fisheries artifacts.
Source set includes federal fishery/food safety sources plus land/environment and traceability standards with refresh/decay and review metadata.
Scenario suite covers normal execution, missing artifacts, seasonal/field gating, completion-safe refusal, and boundary-routing behavior.
Deployment and Positioning and readiness notes document rollback, promotion criteria, and specification-based operation posture.
notes: No unresolved blocking ambiguities retained for validated operation; ambiguity handling remains explicit and routed.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
